name: Jinhui Holdings Company Limited
summary: Jinhui Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the ship chartering and owning activities in Asia, Australia, North America, China, and Africa. It offers fleet services for cargoes, such as minerals, coal, steel products, and cement. The company is also involved in property investment, and shipping agent and investment activities. In addition, it provides ship management and money lending services. As of December 31, 2019, it had eighteen owned vessels. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
